title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For December 2022
text: Welcome to the final edition of my monthly series of 10 Dividend Growth Stocks for 2022! In this article series, I rank a selection of dividend growth stocks in Dividend Radar and present the ten top-ranked stocks for further research and possible investment.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for December 21st
text: AIZ, CBRL and GIII have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on December 21, 2022.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for December 19th
text: ARCE, CVE and AIZ have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on December 19, 2022.

title: Assurant Aims to Reduce Greenhouse Gas Emissions by 40 Percent by 2030
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today announced its goal to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 40 percent by 2030. The target, which aligns with the Paris Agreement and the Science-based Targets initiative (SBTi), was set as part of the company's environmental, social and governance (ESG) guiding principle to ensure its facilities around the world adhere to sustainability practices.
